name: ui-minigolf-board
description: MinigolfBoard — click tiles to putt the ball across the fairway to the hole. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a NEXT_HOLE HUD control on completion.

schema.name: ui-minigolf-board
schema.description: MinigolfBoard — click tiles to putt the ball across the fairway to the hole. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a NEXT_HOLE HUD control on completion.

emits.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click
Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click
Emits when ball reaches the hole
Emits to advance to the next hole

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click

events.name: Hole In
events.description: Emits when ball reaches the hole

events.name: Next Hole
events.description: Emits to advance to the next hole

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
